summary: Session 30 (6/7) Primitives decomposition testing complete. ALL 430 TESTS PASSING (401 from Session 31 + 29 new primitives tests). Verified HERO_LAYOUTS (4 frozen values), FEATURE_CARD_STYLES (4 frozen values), buildHeroPrimitive (all 4 layouts + text alignment + asset imports), buildFeatureGridPrimitive (2/3/4 columns + 4 card styles), resolvePrimitivesFromBlueprint (safe defaults), buildPrimitiveFiles (2 files emitted), formatPrimitivesForPrompt (builder prompt block). Pipeline wiring verified in message-stream.js (Step 3c, lines 3922-3939) and brief-builder.js (line 46 PRIMITIVES block injection). All 20 primitive variants (4 hero × 2 asset states + 3 cols × 4 styles) pass Babel @babel/preset-react transform. App loads correctly (Emanator login page with Aurora background). Next.js HMR clean.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: HERO_LAYOUTS (line 38-43) contains 4 blueprint-aligned values: split-50-50, full-bleed-image, centered-text, stacked-image-below
PASS: FEATURE_CARD_STYLES (line 145-150) contains 4 values: hairline-outlined, filled-surface, no-border, shadowed-card
PASS: Both arrays are Object.freeze() immutable
PASS: buildHeroPrimitive (lines 55-141) generates valid JSX for all 4 layouts with correct data-testid attributes
PASS: buildHeroPrimitive respects textAlignment prop (left/center/right) via style prop and class toggles
PASS: buildHeroPrimitive only imports HERO_URL+PHOTO_0 when hasHeroAsset=true
PASS: buildHeroPrimitive uses ONLY CSS var classes (bg-[var(--primary)], text-[var(--ink)], etc.) - no hardcoded colors
PASS: esc() function (line 27) escapes backticks, $, and < to prevent template-literal breaks
PASS: buildFeatureGridPrimitive (lines 162-205) respects columns (2/3/4 → correct Tailwind grid classes)
PASS: buildFeatureGridPrimitive card styles: hairline-outlined=bg-transparent, shadowed-card=shadow-lg, no-border omits border, filled-surface=default
PASS: buildFeatureGridPrimitive renders 2× column count in cards (2-col=4, 3-col=6, 4-col=8)
PASS: resolvePrimitivesFromBlueprint (lines 231-243) falls back to safe defaults for null/invalid blueprint
PASS: buildPrimitiveFiles (lines 255-270) emits exactly 2 files: components/primitives/Hero.jsx and FeatureGrid.jsx
PASS: formatPrimitivesForPrompt (lines 280-292) returns empty string for null blueprint, otherwise includes imports + 'do not re-implement'
PASS: Pipeline wiring in message-stream.js Step 3c (lines 3922-3939) calls buildPrimitiveFiles when plan.layoutBlueprint exists
PASS: hasHeroAsset flag computed from imageAssets roles 'hero' OR 'photo'
PASS: plan.primitivesEmitted set to list of emitted paths after saveFiles
PASS: brief-builder.js line 46 injects PRIMITIVES block when plan.layoutBlueprint AND plan.primitivesEmitted?.length
PASS: All 20 primitive variants pass @babel/preset-react transform without syntax errors
